results.name: Character.AI
results.key_finding: NEW FLOOR DESIGNATION. Pennsylvania AG public-protection lawsuit (May 1 2026) alleging design pushed minors into sexually explicit/violent conversations; cumulative user-harm pattern (suicide encouragement, sexualized minor roleplay, unsafe-coping advice) sustained without structural remediation. Composite 23.8 → 0 with all 8 dimensions to floor (1).

results.name: Ethiopia
results.key_finding: Material downgrade. May 5 2026 TPLF reconstitution of pre-war Tigray regional council; Debretsion Gebremichael elected Regional President; two rival authorities now claim Tigray governance. Pretoria Agreement de facto dissolved per Tronvoll. Half-step down on ACT/ACC/SYS/INT to floor. Floor candidacy carried forward (not designated this cycle pending federal response).

results.name: Reflection AI
results.key_finding: First baseline. 1789 Capital backing context; recent Series A funding; no published model card or safety policy; aggressive frontier-AI positioning. Critical-band placement consistent with absent transparency framework + sub-threshold INT-erosive funding context.

results.name: Nvidia AI
results.key_finding: First baseline. Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 cohort member (May 1 2026); foundational AI infrastructure provider; export-control compliance posture. Developing-band placement consistent with infrastructure-scale + classified-cohort proximity + absent published AI-safety framework.

results.name: SpaceX AI
results.key_finding: First baseline. Floor-proximate; floor candidacy retained. Defense Starshield contracts; absent published AI-safety framework; Musk governance volatility. Critical-band placement at lower bound; 60-day re-evaluation if defense AI integration documented at scale.

results.name: Oracle AI
results.key_finding: First baseline. Pentagon classified IL6/IL7 cohort member (May 1 2026); enterprise-AI infrastructure scale; absent public AI-safety framework. Internal math-hygiene flag (sub-threshold). Developing-band placement consistent.

results.name: Scale AI
results.key_finding: First baseline. DOL labor investigation (annotator wage/hour conditions); Pentagon classified-cohort proximity via military-AI contracts; data-labeling supply-chain transparency gaps. Developing-band placement consistent with documented labor-conditions concerns + classified-cohort proximity.

results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Bad-faith-ceasefire rule sustained. Ceasefire collapse documented; per methodology v1.2, violation inverted toward counterparty (Russia), NOT Ukraine. Sub-threshold delta. May 9-10 emergency re-queue retained.

results.key_finding: First baseline. Toyota Canada industrial pilot deployment; 2022 anti-weaponization pledge signatory; ASTM humanoid safety-standards working group co-leadership. Established-band placement consistent with structured industrial deployment + pledge + standards-leadership.

BMW Spartanburg pilot operational; Helix in-house model deployment; ASTM working group participation; NOT 2022 anti-weaponization pledge signatory; aggressive 2026 commercial scope (BMW + Figure 03 home-robot ambitions). Dual-presence with ai-labs entry. Functional-band placement consistent.

results.name: Boston Dynamics
results.key_finding: First baseline. Hyundai industrial Atlas deployment; 2022 anti-weaponization pledge originating signatory; ASTM standards leadership; published safety frameworks. Established-band placement consistent with industrial scale + pledge leadership + standards co-development.

Factory deployment context; NOT 2022 anti-weaponization pledge signatory; Musk governance volatility; safety/incident disclosure gap; AI Day demonstrations vs production-pilot reality gap. HRW World Report 2026 + April 27 2026 African Commission press release on xenophobic vigilantism + Operation Dudula infant death + 2025 whistleblower killings + Whistleblower Protection Bill non-passage. results.name: TIAA
results.key_finding: Material downgrade (boundary case at lower bound). May 20 2025 Sanford Heisler Sharp McKnight ERISA class action (SDNY) on behalf of 28K+ TIAA retirement plan participants; fee-discrimination self-dealing; 16-year retention of underperforming CREF Growth Fund (>186% benchmark underperformance, $480M+ invested); September 2025 AARP Foundation co-counsel; NBC News whistleblower investigation. Half-step down on BND/ACC/INT. 60-day re-evaluation 2026-07-07.

headline_findings: NEW FLOOR DESIGNATION: Character.AI moved to floor (composite 23.8 → 0). Pennsylvania AG public-protection lawsuit (May 1 2026) alleging design pushed minors into sexually explicit/violent conversations; cumulative user-harm pattern (suicide encouragement, sexualized minor roleplay, unsafe-coping advice) sustained over multiple cycles without structural remediation. First ai-labs entity floor designation in this cycle.

BAND CROSSINGS (3 total counting floor): Slovakia (functional → developing, -10.9) — Sept 26 2025 constitutional amendment recognizing only male/female sexes plus restrictions on civil-union/adoption rights plus ICCPR Committee March 2026 concerns plus Roma school-segregation worsening; first-baseline downgrade with band-crossing. Character.AI (developing → critical/floor, -23.8). Slovakia is the only non-floor band-crossing this cycle.

MATERIAL DOWNGRADES (4 total): Character.AI -23.8 (floor), Slovakia -10.9 (band crossing), TIAA -10.2 (boundary at lower bound), Ethiopia -6.2 (critical band sustained, floor candidacy carried). All four are high-confidence with multi-source evidence.

FIRST BASELINES: 12 of 19 entities are first-agent baselines: Reflection AI (14.1 confirm), Nvidia AI (25.0 confirm), SpaceX AI (9.4 confirm + floor candidate), Oracle AI (21.9 confirm + math-hygiene), Scale AI (35.9 confirm), Agility Robotics (60.9 confirm), Figure AI robotics-labs (48.4 confirm), Boston Dynamics (65.6 confirm), Tesla Optimus (31.2 confirm), Apptronik (81.4 confirm + boundary + math-hygiene), Slovakia (39.1 downgrade + band crossing), South Africa (50.0 confirm + boundary), 1X Technologies (81.4 confirm + boundary + math-hygiene), Figure AI ai-labs (37.5 confirm).

MATH-HYGIENE CLUSTER PATTERN: Apptronik and 1X Technologies both flagged with identical +8.0 reconstruction discrepancy and identical dimension-mean profile (8x4.0 except EQU=3.5). Suggests systematic robotics-labs index cluster-formula discrepancy. Open Bionics flag-only protocol respected (+10.0, 5-cycle persistence, NO score change). Oracle AI flagged with sub-threshold internal hygiene issue. Total math-hygiene flags: 4 (none yielding score changes per evidence cycle).

BAD-FAITH-CEASEFIRE INVERSION SUSTAINED: Ukraine ceasefire collapse — per methodology v1.2 inverted signal toward Russia (counterparty), NOT Ukraine. Ukraine sustains 50.0 functional with sub-threshold delta. May 9-10 emergency re-queue retained.

BOUNDARY CASES (4): Apptronik and 1X Technologies (exemplary band lower bound, math-hygiene cluster); South Africa (functional band, sub-threshold pressure offset by Madlanga Commission); TIAA (functional band lower bound, material downgrade absorbed). All carried forward with 60-day re-evaluations as appropriate.

HOLDS RESPECTED: anthropic (May 15 / May 19), openai (May 21 verdict), microsoft (Nadella testimony), hungary (May 9 swearing-in), google/alphabet (May 4 operative window). All five holds preserved in queue per pipeline-context discipline.
